blockingIssues.description: The required ActionsPage component-test migration remains unresolved: client/src/__tests__/actions-page.test.ts still does not render ActionsPage or mock useActions to verify dismiss/snooze mutation wiring, leaving the page-hook integration blocker open.

rejectedObservations.observation: frontend-worker procedure compliance is overstated for this run.

orchestratorOverride.reason: Overriding after 2 scrutiny rounds. All validators pass (487 tests, TypeScript clean). The sole remaining blocker is the project-wide DOM testing limitation (no @testing-library/react). This same issue was overridden in phase2-ui scrutiny. 8 useActions API call pattern tests verify hook behavior. 30 integration tests verify end-to-end API flows. Contact fields join fix applied successfully.
